title: Device Home Screen - Disconnected device
scenario: Device Home Screen shows greyed out UI elements and "Not Connected" label when paired headset is powered off
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is already paired with the app.
3. On the Home screen, verify the paired device is listed and connected.
4. Turn off the paired Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button until it powers off).
5. Observe the Device Home Screen for the paired device entry.
expected: The Device Home Screen should display: Device Name (with an \"i\" info icon if applicable), a crossed red dot with \"Not Connected\" label, a greyed out device image, a \"...\" (more options) button, greyed out battery icons, and the firmware version \"X.Y.Z\".
